props.caption: Germany funded 50,000 Shrike strike drones with Auterion terminal-guidance software as the EU and Ukraine unveiled a joint drone deal — battlefield autonomy bought as an industrial base.

items.note: Nine vessels crossed on 15 July against 125–140 on a normal day, with no crude supertankers or LNG carriers visible, as US strike waves, a resumed blockade of Iranian ports and a disabled tanker met Iranian warnings that the strait is a red line; Brent settled near $84 and seven-day war-risk cover ran near 5% of hull value.

The Spain–Argentina final on 19 July at MetLife is the tournament's only National Special Security Event, with President Trump attending; counter-drone rules, FBI and DHS intelligence hubs and grant-funded surveillance are being built to outlast the trophy ceremony.

After the 2-1 win over England, players raised a 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas' banner that Reuters traced to fans in the stands; Downing Street said the Falklands are Britain's and Starmer backed a FIFA probe, Milei called the display valid, and FIFA said only that it is assessing match reports.

Germany funded 50,000 SkyFall Shrike strike drones for Ukraine with Auterion terminal-guidance software, and days later the EU and Kyiv unveiled a joint drone-production deal, financing battlefield autonomy as a distributed industrial base.
SK Hynix's new Nasdaq ADR round-tripped from its debut, the KOSPI fell 6.37% led by memory chips, and the Nasdaq slipped as oil held near its highest since mid-June on the Hormuz risk.

items.what: Argentine players raised a 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas' banner after beating England 2-1; Britain demanded a FIFA investigation and Milei called it valid, while FIFA said only that its disciplinary committee is assessing the match reports, with no charge or sanction on the record.

Just nine vessels crossed the Strait of Hormuz on 15 July, about six to seven percent of normal, as US strike waves, a resumed blockade and a disabled tanker met Iranian defiance; Brent settled near $84 and war-risk cover ran near 5% of hull value.

Germany funded 50,000 Shrike strike drones for Ukraine with Auterion autonomy software, deliveries already under way, days before the EU and Kyiv unveiled a joint drone-production deal that reads battlefield autonomy as an industrial base.

Sunday's Spain–Argentina final at MetLife is the tournament's only National Special Security Event, with President Trump attending; counter-drone powers, intelligence hubs and grant-funded surveillance are being built to outlast the match.
SK Hynix's Nasdaq ADR reversed hard to about $152, the KOSPI fell 6.37% and the Nasdaq slid 1.47% as the crowded AI-and-memory trade unwound, while oil held near mid-June highs on the war risk.

Argentina marks the 32nd anniversary of the AMIA bombing on 18 July with the trial in absentia of accused Iranian officials advancing; no fresh Iran-linked threat or football connection has surfaced on the record, and the crossover stays dormant.
